prompt_text: Pick up the red cube and place it to the left.
Pick up the blue cube and move it to the right.
Pick up the bottle and put it on the left.
Place the object to the right.
Move the object to the left.
Move the object to the right side.
Pick up the red cube and move it to the right.
Place the item on the left.
Stop the robot.
Pick up the blue cube and set it on the right.

Use gestures to pick up the red cube and move it left.
(Object: red cube — perform the action gesture, then the location gesture.)

Use gestures to pick up the blue cube and move it right.
(Object: blue cube — perform the action gesture, then the location gesture.)

Use gestures to pick up the bottle and place it on the left.
(Object: bottle — perform the action gesture, then the location gesture.)

Use gestures to place the object to the right.
(Perform the action gesture, then the location gesture.)

Use gestures to place the object on the left.
(Perform the action gesture, then the location gesture.)

Use gestures to place the object on the right.
(Perform the action gesture, then the location gesture.)

Use gestures to pick up the red cube and move it to the right.
(Object: red cube — perform the action gesture, then the location gesture.)

Use gestures to place the object on the left.
(Perform the action gesture, then the location gesture.)

Use a gesture to stop the robot.
(Perform the stop gesture.)

Use gestures to pick up the blue cube and place it on the right.
(Object: blue cube — perform the action gesture, then the location gesture.)
Pick up the red cube (say the command, then gesture the location: left).
Pick up the blue cube (say the command, then gesture the location: right).
Pick up the bottle and move it to the left (say the command, then gesture the location: left).
Place the object to the right (say the command, then gesture the location: right).
Move the object to the left (say the command, then gesture the location: left).
Move the object to the right (say the command, then gesture the location: right).
Pick up the red cube and move it to the right (say the command, then gesture the location: right).
Place the object on the left (say the command, then gesture the location: left).
Stop the robot (say or gesture the stop command).
Pick up the blue cube and place it on the right (say the command, then gesture the location: right).
